reports.title: FinceptTerminal

reports.title: RuView
reports.summary: 利用普通WiFi信号实现实时人体姿态估计、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需任何视频像素
reports.content: RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
